steps.title: Set Clamp Voltage
steps.description: Varistor voltage should exceed peak line voltage by 10-20%.

steps.title: Check Surge Rating
steps.description: Match energy and peak current to expected transients.

steps.title: Add Backup
steps.description: Use fuse so failed-short varistor is disconnected.

tips: Use MOVs for mains, MLVs for signals
